summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2 User Management features. All 36 backend tests passed (16 new user management tests + 20 existing tests). Frontend tests verified admin sees 5 nav tabs with Users tab, standard user sees 4 tabs without Users tab, and role-based access control works correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

seed_data_creation: Standard test user (testuser@waterbill.com) created for testing role-based access
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 User Management fully tested. Admin can list/create/delete users. Standard users get 403 on user management endpoints. Bottom nav shows Users tab only for admin role. All P0 features (modular routes, pagination) still working. SMS endpoint is MOCKED - only logs messages.

backend_user_management: POST /api/auth/login with admin@waterbill.com / admin123 - returns role=admin
POST /api/auth/login with testuser@waterbill.com / user123 - returns role=user
GET /api/auth/me returns user info for admin
GET /api/auth/me returns user info for standard user
GET /api/auth/users (admin) - returns user list without password_hash
DELETE /api/auth/users/{id} (admin self) - returns 400 cannot delete self
frontend_user_management: Admin login shows Users tab in bottom nav (5 tabs total)
Standard user login does NOT show Users tab (4 tabs total)
Admin can access /users page and see user list
Standard user navigating to /users sees 'Admin access required'
User creation dialog opens with all form fields
User list displays users with role badges and delete buttons
frontend_other_pages: Consumers page loads with 3 consumer rows
Bills page loads with 2 bill rows
Payments page loads with 6 payment rows

mocked_apis.POST /api/sms/send: Only logs messages to console, uses WhatsApp deep-links on frontend for actual messaging
